_comment: Agent/model config for the C verification pipeline. CLI flags override these; these override built-in defaults. Edit model names here instead of passing --model/--agent every run. Frequently-changed things (target, --only, budgets, --dry-run) stay as CLI flags.

models._comment: codex/claude/kimicode = default model per backend. kimicode uses kimi --model and kimi --thinking/--no-thinking.

timeouts._comment: Per-stage wall-clock budgets in seconds, used by run_pipeline.py when the matching --*-timeout flag is not passed. CLI flag > this > built-in default.
